reasons: family is available for internal experimentation
matches redesign or established website lead

prompt:
Build a local-business website mockup using the approved niche template workflow.

Template family:
- Use: Lead Capture Restoration
- Manifest: templates/roofing/families/lead-capture-restoration/template-manifest.json
- Preserve the family design language, section rhythm, image style, and conversion pattern.

Verified facts to preserve exactly:
- Business name: M&B Roofing
- Phone: 0424 371 622
- Email: ghilton@live.com.au
- Address: Jamison Town, NSW 2750
- Website: missing

Generated demo content policy:
- The customer-facing page must look complete and natural.
- Do not print labels like placeholder, inferred, generated, audit, or Open Design on the frontend.
- It is okay to use generated demo copy for services, FAQ, process, benefits, CTA labels, and demo proof modules.
- Do not claim real reviews, licences, awards, exact years, prices, warranties, or project counts unless provided as verified facts.

Copy plan:
- Hero angle: roof restorations for Jamison Town / Greater Western Sydney, with a clearer first impression and a simpler path to action.
- Hero headline: Roof Restorations for Jamison Town / Greater Western Sydney
- Hero subcopy: M&B Roofing can present a clear, phone-friendly roofing page with services, trust cues, and a fast quote path for local customers.
- Primary CTA: Call for a roof inspection
- Secondary CTA: View services
- Services: Roof Restorations, Roof Repairs, Gutters Fascia And Down Pipes, Tile And Metal Roofing, Core Service, Emergency Or Fast Response
- Proof strategy: Use process clarity, service-area relevance, realistic project modules, and review placeholders until real Google/customer proof is supplied.
- Final CTA: Ready to make the roof easier to understand? Call for a roof inspection.

Requirements:
- Make mobile first-class, not an afterthought.
- Include clear CTA/contact path.
- Include LocalBusiness-ready content structure.
- Use selected template images/assets if provided.
- Output real HTML/CSS assets and screenshots for QA.

services.name: Roof Restorations
services.description: Restoration copy can explain cleaning, sealing, repainting, and roof-life improvement for homes around Jamison Town / Greater Western Sydney.

services.name: Roof Repairs
services.description: Repair copy can focus on leaks, storm damage, cracked tiles, flashing, and practical quote steps.

services.description: Gutter copy can cover cleaning, repair, replacement, water flow, and inspection during roof work.

process.text: Customer calls or sends a short enquiry.
The roofer confirms the roof issue, suburb, and preferred inspection time.
The site explains likely services and prepares the customer for a quote conversation.

faq.question: Can I request a quote for roof restorations?
faq.answer: Yes. The page should make it simple to call or send an enquiry, then confirm the roof issue and service area.

faq.question: Do you service Jamison Town / Greater Western Sydney?
faq.answer: M&B Roofing can use this section to state the confirmed service areas once the owner supplies final coverage details.

faq.question: What details should I send first?
faq.answer: A short description, suburb, photos if available, and whether the work is urgent are enough for the first conversation.

finalCta.text: Ready to make the roof easier to understand? Call for a roof inspection.
